description: Jonathan Shamul, founder of Aleph.im, discusses deploying a Solana indexer on Aleph.im, a decentralized cloud computing platform. He explains the functionality of the platform, including storage and computing resources, and the importance of indexers for DApps to manage data efficiently.
topic_summary: In this session, Jonathan Shamul explains how to deploy a Solana indexer on Aleph.im, detailing the platform's decentralized nature and its advantages over traditional cloud services. He covers the role of indexers in managing blockchain data and enhancing DApp performance [t=202.48].
